synopsis: [El-errata] ELBA-2026-2785 Oracle Linux 9 libvirt bug fix and enhancement update
overview: Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2026-2785
description:
[10.10.0-15.7.0.1]
- Set SOURCE_DATE_EPOCH from changelog [Orabug: 32019554]

[10.10.0-15.7.el9_7]
- qemu_validate: Drop VIR_DOMAIN_HYPERV_SYNIC dependency on VIR_DOMAIN_HYPERV_VPINDEX (RHEL-140916)
- qemu_validate: Drop VIR_DOMAIN_HYPERV_STIMER dependency on VIR_DOMAIN_HYPERV_VPINDEX (RHEL-140916)
full_text:
Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2026-2785

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2026-2785.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 9 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
libvirt-10.10.0-15.7.0.1.el9_7.x86_64.rpm

[10.10.0-15.7.0.1]
